h1.class: text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-100 mb-6

div.h1: Build Modern Web Apps with MetaOWL

p.class: text-lg md:text-xl text-gray-400 mb-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto

div.p: MetaOWL is a meta-framework for Odoo OWL on Vite. Build powerful, reactive web applications with file-based routing, state management, and SEO optimization.

a.class: px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg font-medium no-underline hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors
px-6 py-3 bg-gray-700 text-gray-200 rounded-lg font-medium no-underline hover:bg-gray-600 transition-colors

div.class: w-12 h-12 bg-blue-950 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4

div.p: Built on Vite for instant hot module replacement.

div.class: w-12 h-12 bg-green-950 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4
w-12 h-12 bg-purple-950 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4

div.p: Built-in store with mutations and actions.
